'''Carida Engines''' was a heavy machine manufacturer based on [[Carida/Legends|Carida]]. They were most famous for their [[Mountain Terrain Armored Transport]] [[Walker/Legends|walker]] which were employed several years after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].
